headline: Seagate Announces Closing of Exchanges with Holders of $185.908 Million Principal Amount of Exchangeable Notes

headline: Seagate (STX) Lands A Stunning Target Hike As Storage Demand Accelerates
summary: With a five-year EPS forecast of 69.11%, Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX) is among the 12 Best Future Stocks to Buy Right Now.
